# `api.companies.get_inherited_packaging_tariffs`

> `GET /companies/{companyId}/inheritedPackagingTariffs` — ACPortal

**Python**

```python
api.companies.get_inherited_packaging_tariffs(company_id: str) -> list[PackagingTariff]
```

**CLI**

```bash
ab companies get_inherited_packaging_tariffs <company_id>
```

GET /companies/{companyId}/inheritedPackagingTariffs

## Query parameters — `InheritFromParams`

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `inheritFrom` | `Optional[str]` | no | Company ID to inherit from |

## Response

Returns a list of `List[PackagingTariff]`.

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `tariffId` | `Optional[str]` | no | Tariff ID |
| `rates` | `Optional[list[dict]]` | no | Tariff rate entries |
